error.signature: CMake Error: Imported target 'Boost::filesystem' includes non-existent path

verdict.summary: An imported target references paths that do not exist on disk. Library was moved, uninstalled, or partially installed.

dead_ends.why_fails: Manually creating library directories does not provide the actual libraries and headers.

dead_ends.action: Remove CMakeCache.txt and assume reconfigure will find it
dead_ends.why_fails: If the library is not installed, reconfiguring still will not find it. Cache removal alone is not a fix.

workarounds.action: Reinstall the dependency that provides the imported target
workarounds.how: sudo apt install libboost-filesystem-dev  # provides Boost::filesystem target

workarounds.action: Delete CMakeCache.txt AND install the missing library, then reconfigure
workarounds.how: rm -rf build/ && sudo apt install libfoo-dev && cmake -B build

workarounds.action: Set the package DIR variable to the correct install prefix
